# **Sprint Report 3- Cs Life** 

# Team Name: BitByte 

### Members: Marco Nasirpour, Nima Jamshidi, 

Adrian Lopez, Ethan Zarella,   
Saniha Sreedhara 

### Release 1.0, Release Date: 7/14/2026

### Revision: N/A, Revision Date: N/A 

**Actions to stop doing:** 

	The team needs to stop overcomplicating meetings and show up to the meetings on time. The reason we need to stop doing this is because we need to utilize all the time we have with the TA to ensure that not only we are on track with everything but also everyone in the group is involved and knows what is expected and what needs to be done. 

**Actions to start doing:** 

	The team needs to start finalizing important components of the project like events, and mini-games. These are the main sections of the project as the players will spend most of their time in those sections, so we need to finish them quickly. We also need to discuss whether more mini-games or events are needed to be added. 

**Actions to keep doing:**

	We have been very organized and ensured that everything is documented. We also have been very communicative with each other about what is expected through text messages so we need to continue doing these qualities. 

 

**Work completed/not completed:** 

* Completed User Stories:  
  * As a player, I want the ability to choose clearly to progress through the game all the way until graduation.  
  * As a player, I want the ability to choose how I dedicate my time each quarter and those choices affect my statistics   
  * As a player, I want my game progress to be saved and loaded so that I can continue playing without  losing my character, statistics and quarter progression  
* Not Completed User Stories:  
  * As a player, I want to play random mini-games in between the quarter (Partially Done)  
    * Tasks: Mini-Game Selector System **AND** Mini-Game Logic  
  * As a player, I want random life events to occur in between the quarters (Partially Done)   
    * Tasks: Design Random Event System **AND** Update Player Statistics  
  * As a player, I want an end game that has different graduation outcomes based on the choices and statistics gathered throughout college.    
    * Tasks: Implement Graduation Logic **AND** Design the Graduation Result Interface

**Work completion rate:** 

* Total number of user stories completed: 3 (US-1, US-2, US-3)  
* Total number of ideal work hours: 3 \+ 8 \+ 5 \= 16 hours total  
* Total number of days during sprint 3: 7 days (Wednesday July 8- Tuesday July 14\)   
* User Stories per day: 3 / 7  
* Ideal work hours/days \= 16 / 7 \= 2.286 hours OR 2 hours and 17 minutes per day  
  * **The reason why the hours are too low is because 3 of the user stories were not fully completed in one sprint however were later finished in sprint 4**  
* Average Work Completion Rate (Sprints 1-3):  
  * Average user stories / day \= 8 / 21 \= 0.381 user stories per day  
  * Average ideal work hours/day \= 3.048 (approximately 3 hours and 3 minutes per day)  
* Final Sprint 3 Burn-up chart
